title: ../V3Ast.cpp:481: Node has no back, already unlinked? -- interfaces, modport, unpacked array badness

features.name: unpacked array of interface instances
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of parameterized interface instances

features.name: modport with unpacked interface array
features.description: Code should include a modport that receives an unpacked array of interface instances

features.name: interface with multiple modport types
features.description: Code should include an interface with distinct modport types (input and output modports)

features.name: multiple module instantiations with interface arrays
features.description: Code should include two instances of a module that both use unpacked arrays of interfaces via modports
